title: Bitcoin Dips Below $64K as Fed Rate Hike Fears Rise
summary: Bitcoin briefly fell under $64,000 as rising U.S. bond yields increased expectations of Federal Reserve rate hikes. Binance reportedly stepped in to prevent a deeper drop in BTC prices.
body:
Bitcoin prices dipped below $64,000 on Friday, reacting to surging U.S. bond yields that have heightened the likelihood of Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. The drop comes amid broader market volatility, with investors reassessing risk assets in anticipation of tighter monetary policy.

Reports suggest that Binance, the world's largest crypto exchange, activated a “plunge protection team” to inject liquidity and stabilize Bitcoin's price. This move follows previous instances where Binance has intervened to prevent sharp declines in BTC prices, though the exchange has not officially confirmed these actions.

For everyday investors, this volatility highlights the sensitivity of Bitcoin to macroeconomic factors like interest rates. While short-term price swings can be unsettling, they also present opportunities for those willing to ride out the market's fluctuations. The involvement of major exchanges in stabilizing prices underscores the growing institutional influence in the crypto market.

Investors should watch for further signals from the Federal Reserve and monitor how Bitcoin reacts to any official statements on interest rates. If bond yields continue to climb, Bitcoin could face additional downward pressure, making it crucial for traders to stay informed and prepared for potential volatility. Read more → https://cointelegraph.com/markets/bitcoin-falls-under-64k-us-bond-yields-fed-rate-hike-odds?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
twitterThread: Bitcoin dips below $64K as Fed rate hike fears grow. Binance reportedly steps in to stabilize prices. 📉
Rising US bond yields are pushing Bitcoin lower, as investors brace for potential Fed rate hikes. Binance's 'plunge protection team' may be active again to prevent a deeper drop.

If bond yields keep climbing, Bitcoin could face more pressure. Stay alert for Fed signals and be ready for volatility. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-24-bitcoin-dips-below-64k-as-fed-rate-hike-fears-rise
standaloneTweet: Bitcoin just dipped below $64K as Fed rate hike fears spike. Binance may be stepping in to stabilize prices. Keep an eye on bond yields for clues on where BTC goes next.
